text.title: Tailwind Design Tokens Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the tailwind-design-tokens methodology end-to-end.

step.name: capture-source
step.input: Figma Variables export OR existing tokens.css.
step.action: Normalise to Style Dictionary input; reconcile naming convention.
step.decision-gate: If Tailwind major is unknown, block per rule r6.

step.name: declare-primitives
step.action: Write primitives to `tokens.css` at `:root`. Colours in RGB channel format; spacing in rem.

step.name: map-semantics-to-tailwind
step.action: Write semantic tokens as `var(--token)` references in the Tailwind theme block (v3) or `@theme` directive (v4).

step.name: dark-mode-and-opacity
step.action: Declare dark-mode tokens under `[data-theme="dark"]`; configure RGB channel colours with `<alpha-value>` for opacity modifiers.

step.name: safelist-and-validate
step.input: Code grep for dynamic class assembly.
step.action: Enumerate dynamic classes into safelist; run scripts/validate-tailwind-design-tokens.py; flag "ready for owner review".
